name: Toronto Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cereal with hot milk in a 1-1/2 quart mixing bowl and let it stand about 10 minutes, or until the cereal has absorbed all of the milk.
2. With the electric mixer on high speed, beat in the oil and eggs until completely blended.
3. Remove the beaters.
4. Using a sturdy spoon, gently stir in the cake mix until thoroughly moistened, but do not overmix or overbeat; this will prevent a heavy and tough muffin texture.
5. Cover the bowl and let the batter stand for 15 minutes while you preheat the oven to 400°F and grease 12 muffin tin wells with Cramasco (Crisco).
6. Divide the batter equally among the 12 wells. If using cupcake tins, you will have 15 muffins.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Wipe the tops of each muffin while still warm with softened butter or margarine.
